zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多，关注关键支撑与突破机会
zh.content:
目前SOL/USD维持在$66.85附近，日内波动幅度有限，整体呈现轻微回调后的震荡整理。从价格相对20日均线$66.35略高来看，短期多头仍占优势，但缺乏明显上涨动能，市场情绪偏谨慎。需关注价格能否守住均线支撑。  

MACD显示为0.580，处于零轴上方，暗示多头占优，但缺少信号线对比无法判断动能强弱。价格高点$67.12构成近期阻力，低点$66.52为短期支撑，若突破高点可带动进一步上攻，跌破支撑则可能触发调整，交易者需灵活设置止损。  

从技术形态来看，短期震荡格局明显，多空力量较为均衡。若SOL持续收盘于均线之上，可考虑低吸策略，止盈位可参考$67.50-$68区间。反之，如出现快速下破支撑，应减仓或观望，避免追涨杀跌。  

综合分析，SOL短期仍偏多，但上涨动能有限，操作上建议以防守型多单为主，密切关注关键支撑与阻力的突破情况，结合日内波动调整仓位，保持风险可控。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 66.85, slightly above its 20-period simple moving average of 66.35, suggesting that short-term momentum remains mildly constructive despite the negligible 24-hour decline of 0.09%. Price action has been confined to a relatively narrow intraday range between 66.52 and 67.12, indicating a period of consolidation rather than a decisive directional move. Holding above the SMA keeps the near-term bias modestly bullish, although stronger follow-through buying is needed to confirm an extended upward trend.

The available momentum indicators present a cautiously positive picture. The MACD value of 0.5802 remains in positive territory, which generally reflects underlying bullish momentum and continued buyer participation. However, the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation of crossover strength. Likewise, with RSI data unavailable, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be fully assessed. Even so, the positive MACD reading suggests that downside pressure remains relatively contained unless momentum begins to deteriorate.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the session low of 66.52, followed by secondary support around the SMA region near 66.35. A sustained break below these levels could expose a deeper retracement toward the mid-65 area. On the upside, initial resistance stands near 67.12, the recent high. A successful breakout above this barrier would improve bullish sentiment and could open the path toward higher resistance zones around 68.00 and beyond.

Traders may consider a range-trading approach while price remains between support at 66.35–66.52 and resistance near 67.12. Aggressive bullish positions become more attractive on a confirmed breakout above resistance accompanied by expanding volume and continued positive MACD momentum. Conversely, a close below the moving average would weaken the current structure and favor a more defensive stance. Risk management remains essential, as the recent tight trading range suggests that a volatility expansion could develop once consolidation ends.
